scope.summary: The dead lease/session subsystem is absent at HEAD, B14a's clear-before-set sequence survives as the wired session identity path, and stale session-resource registry/docs references have been removed.
out_of_scope: No tracked file deletion was performed in this turn; commit b5736dce, already an ancestor of HEAD, removed crates/oraclemcp-db/src/lease.rs and crates/oraclemcp-core/src/session_tool.rs.
The live DRCP lane was not run in this turn.

entry_points.name: deleted lease/session subsystem is absent at HEAD
entry_points.trace: git merge-base --is-ancestor b5736dce HEAD passed; git show --name-status --oneline b5736dce shows D crates/oraclemcp-core/src/session_tool.rs and D crates/oraclemcp-db/src/lease.rs; test ! -e crates/oraclemcp-db/src/lease.rs and test ! -e crates/oraclemcp-core/src/session_tool.rs printed lease_rs_absent and session_tool_absent.

entry_points.name: surviving B14a clear sequence is in the wired db connection path
entry_points.trace: rg -n 'apply_session_identity|CLEAR_IDENTIFIER|SET_MODULE\\(NULL|SET_CLIENT_INFO\\(NULL' crates/oraclemcp-db/src/connection.rs found apply_session_identity and the clear PL/SQL block at connection.rs:2001 and connection.rs:2014.

entry_points.name: no stale core registry/resource/docs session template remains
entry_points.trace: rg -n 'oracle://session|lease-backed|session state for a lease|ResourceUri::Session|session_tool|crates/oraclemcp-db/src/lease.rs|PreviewImpact|require_lease_id' crates README.md docs tests/conformance scripts --glob '!target/**' produced no B14b registry, resource template, or docs references after fb7c093e.

Residual string matches in crates/oraclemcp-db/tests/live_idle_kill.rs, crates/oraclemcp-telemetry/src/otlp/logs.rs, and crates/oraclemcp-core/tests/phase0_capacity.rs are not B14b registry/resource/docs references.
